description_full: 🎨 Cover: impressionist depiction of a moment from June 01, 1857. Event: Charles Baudelaire's Les Fleurs du mal is published. Quick context: Charles-Pierre Baudelaire was a French poet, essayist, translator and art critic. His poems are described as exhibiting mastery of rhythm and rhyme, containing an exoticism inheri… Trivia: Related: Charles Baudelaire • Source: Wikipedia (On This Day)
